rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §11.066 governs trustee eligibility based on criminal convictions. The two provisions address unrelated subjects.
quote: A person is ineligible to serve as a member of the board of trustees of a school district if the person has been convicted of a felony or an offense under Section 43.021, Penal Code.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this trustee eligibility statute.
